title: DOI — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Department of Investigation (DOI) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the DOI Open Data datasets (data.cityofnewyork.us — evictions, City Marshals revenue, the Policy & Procedure Recommendations portal, monthly performance indicators), nyc.gov/site/doi, and the Kaseware public complaint intake portal (app.kaseware.us). Includes the NYC geography spine carried by the Evictions dataset.

x-nyc-commons.note: Geography/identifier/address/money definitions are $ref'd from the canonical nyc-commons set; agency-specific definitions remain local.

Borough.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Borough); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Borough still resolve.

Coordinates.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Coordinates); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Coordinates still resolve.

Geography.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/GeographySpine); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Geography still resolve.

MarshalReference.description: A reference to a NYC City Marshal — the independent public officials appointed by the Mayor and overseen by DOI, whose enforcement activity (evictions) and revenue DOI publishes.

AcceptanceStatus.description: Whether an agency accepted a DOI Policy & Procedure Recommendation ('Acceptance Status').

ImplementationStatus.description: How far an accepted DOI recommendation has been implemented ('Implementation Status').
